fully_covered_goal_validity_failure_v1.why_first: This is the direct terminal-proof blocker. If a fully covered goal-region/object-relation row can still be a_wrong_b_correct, coverage completion cannot be used as terminal ObjectNav goal validity.

object_relation_gap_followup_v1.why_deferred: This branch covers more rows, but resolving it before explaining the wrong fully covered case would still leave the terminal-proof blocker unresolved.

selected_branch.name: fully_covered_goal_validity_failure_v1
selected_branch.selection_reason: A terminal selector cannot be derived until the wrong fully covered case is explained. This branch protects the natural-proof rule by preventing coverage completion from being treated as goal validity.

deferred_branch.name: object_relation_gap_followup_v1
deferred_branch.deferred_until: fully_covered_goal_validity_failure_v1 is closed or converted into a fixed label-free blocker

blocked_shortcuts: tune threshold to hide the a_wrong_b_correct fully covered row
use evaluation label to reject the wrong fully covered candidate
rerun first_eval before a fixed label-free blocker exists
claim wrong-goal or wasted-path improvement from this diagnostic subset
